Our Network

Brands, teams & innovators we work with

New for 2026

The marquee moments that make this the room nobody can skip.

1
Tom Brady × Aescape

The live launch of the Brady Protocol on the summit stage: a world-first reveal in front of the room. Brady is the keystone: his name unlocks F1 drivers, marquee athletes, and the brand room around him.

01: Headline Moment
2
The Longevity Lounge

A Brady-anchored recovery & longevity suite: Aescape, Marriott & Ammortal under one roof. The activation that keeps attendees in the room all day.

02: Flagship Suite
3
CPG Market

The consumer brands winning right now, AG1, Bloom, David, Poppi & more, sampling under one roof. Taste everything, take meetings, place your bets.

03: The Market
4
F1 Paddock Club

Executive trackside access on Friday as the cars hit the track. The money-can't-buy crown of the weekend: reserved for Title sponsors and hand-picked VIPs.

04: Crown Experience

Why We Are Doing This

Connecting brands, teams & innovators

Deals that compound.

Sponsorship Deals & Partnerships
Connect Pro Sports, College Sports & Motorsports teams with wellness & lifestyle consumer brands: community to cultural impact.
Connecting Brand Needs w/ Solutions
Match CMOs & founders with relevant tech and innovation platforms to spark growth.
Brand Halo & Cultural Elevation
Deliver premium experience, team presence, and content capture that lift brand perception and drive conversion.
Run of Day

The itinerary

8:30
Arrival & Welcome
Morning Hyrox Workout
9:30
Panel 1 · The F1 Playbook
Everybody wants the F1 logo. Almost nobody gets the deal behind it, the team, a partner, and a brand weighing the leap.
10:15
BREAK
10:45
Panel 2 · Owning the Customer
Paid media's brutal. The winners own the customer: retention, loyalty, community.
11:30
Panel 3 · Punching Above Your Budget
NeuroGum landed on Yuki Tsunoda's helmet for less than a booth. Here's how small brands buy outsized attention.
12:15
LUNCH · PADEL WITH THE PROSPRESENTED BY
1:45
★ Panel 4 · Tom Brady × Aescape
A fireside on longevity as the next brand frontier, and the live reveal of the Brady Protocol.
2:45
Panel 5 · From Viral to Reliable
Going viral is easy; staying alive isn't. The winners nail the boring stuff first.
3:30
Panel 6 · Brand Is the Moat
Brand is the only moat that compounds. What sport and wellness figured out first.
4:15
CLOSING REMARKS · PADEL WITH PROSPRESENTED BY
7:00
★ VVIP Dinner
Celebrity Chef Experience, powered by Sweetgreen
More than a paddock pass.
ACTIVATIONS & EXPERIENCES
★ Longevity Lounge
Recovery, biometrics, and body reset. You'll feel it by lunch.
CPG Market
The brands winning right now. Taste everything, take notes.
Super Human Tech
Wearables and neurostim you've never had access to. Until today.

Sponsorship tiers

Title / Presenting
$125k+
1–2 brands only
  • Name the summit
  • Headline both tracks
  • F1 Paddock Club (Friday)
  • Cadillac House co-presence
  • 10 VIP passes
  • Host your own guests all weekend
Platinum
$50k+
  • Headline partner both tracks
  • Named hero activation
  • 6–8 VIP intros
  • Recap video + filmed case study
  • 10 VIP passes
Gold
$35k
  • Featured panel seat
  • Co-branded track
  • 1–3 concierge intros
  • Attendee passes
  • Photo set + recap mention
Silver / Activation
$15–25k
  • Booth / wellness activation
  • Branded sampling
  • Attendee list
  • Marketing inclusion

Four tiers. 1–2 Title brands. Every tier built around specific value: introductions, category exclusivity, and presence that becomes relationships.
